_template: Copy this file, remove _template and _notes fields, fill in your values.
_notes_dominance: DOMINANT or RECESSIVE. DOMINANT species win trait expression over RECESSIVE ones.

defaultTraits._notes: Use allele IDs from the built-in trait set or define your own traits first.

_notes_visual: Required for rendering. Without this, bees of this species use the fallback texture.
_notes_spawn: Optional. List biome IDs where this species spawns naturally (wild hive).
